 title: Add tests for get_hover live LSP path and parse_hover_contents edge cases
 ---
 ops/get_hover.rs

Coverage: 67.9% (36/53 lines)

Uncovered lines: 68, 94, 98, 100-101, 103-105, 109-111, 116, 122-124, 223, 228

Two areas:
1. `try_live_lsp` (lines 94-133) - sends textDocument/hover, parses contents and range, enriches
2. `parse_hover_contents` edge cases (lines 223, 228) - empty-language MarkedString + unrecognized array items

Test scenarios:
- Mock LSP returning hover with contents → verify SourceLayer::LiveLsp, contents correct
- Null response → falls through
- parse_hover_contents with {language: "", value: "code"} → no backtick wrapping
- parse_hover_contents with unrecognized item shapes in array → items skipped

#coverage-gap #coverage-gap
\ No newline at end of file
